name: MRTX1719 → WRN axis mismap (OPEN)
what_it_solves: pharmacologic_analyzer maps MRTX1719 to the WRN axis, but MRTX1719 is a PRMT5/MTAP-cooperative agent — the WRN axis is wrong.
how_it_solves: Current code: `'mrtx1719': 'wrn'` at pharmacologic_analyzer.py:66. Correct mapping per Bev2026 + Engstrom 2023 (Cancer Discov 13:2412-2431) + Pettus 2025 (J Med Chem 68:6932-6954): `'mrtx1719': 'prmt5_mtap_cooperative'` — but that axis does not exist yet in the CandidateAxis enum.
why_it_exists: Silent axis mislabelling propagates through the SL engine's pharmacology contribution; any downstream tier decision referencing MRTX1719 for WRN is currently wrong.

source_receipts.note: bug location — not in this KB corpus

gaps_still_open: Fix requires (1) adding PRMT5_MTAP_COOPERATIVE axis to the enum, (2) re-tiering, (3) regression tests, (4) canonical receipt for the new axis.
